title: Contact Me - Afzal Khan
meta_description: Labour MP for Manchester Rusholme covering Ardwick, Fallowfield, Hulme, Moss Side, Rusholme and Whalley Range
headings: h3: *Please note – My social media is monitored by my staff, I receive an extremely high volume of tweets and facebook comments every day so am unable to respond to them all. If you would like to get in touch with me, please email or leave a voicemail message.
h2: Follow me on social media
